name: n8n-bridge
description: Secure bridge for triggering local n8n workflows through gw with Vault-managed tokens.
capability_summary: Triggers n8n workflows via gw command routing, enforcing Vault-backed token handling and deterministic JSON outputs.

parameters.name: workflow
parameters.description: Workflow identifier passed to gw n8n trigger.

parameters.name: payload
parameters.description: Inline JSON payload string for workflow trigger input.

parameters.name: payload_file
parameters.description: Path to JSON payload file when inline payload is not used.
